response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience with C and C++ from early roles but lacks recent, substantial C++ development on Windows platforms in financial domains. While they have strong general software engineering skills and domain exposure to capital markets (e.g., RIDE Capital), there is no explicit demonstration of fixed-income systems, SQL Server/Oracle, or recent STL proficiency. Optional skills like Summit or messaging frameworks are also absent.
strengths: Over 5 years of C/C++ development experience, including early contributions to NI LabWindows/CVI
Strong software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) demonstrated in multiple roles
Domain exposure to capital markets through RIDE Capital, with experience in investment practices and financial software
concerns: Lack of recent or extensive C++ development on Windows platforms in financial systems (last explicit C++ work appears dated)
No clear evidence of fixed-income systems, derivatives, or investment banking domain expertise beyond a single role
Missing mandatory SQL Server/Oracle experience; current SQL experience is primarily with MongoDB (NoSQL)
